articles.title: 'Like my lover': Chinese users bid farewell to AI companions
articles.summary: China's new regulations took effect Wednesday, curbing emotional dependency on AI companions. Major AI providers suspended custom agent and companion features ahead of the deadline.

articles.title: TNTET 2026 answer key out for Paper I and II at trb.tn.gov.in; check key and raise objections till July 22
articles.summary: TNTET Answer Key 2026: The Teachers Recruitment Board (TRB), Tamil Nadu, has released the TNTET 2026 tentative answer key for Paper I and Paper II examinations conducted on July 4 and July 5, 2026. Candidates can access the answer key through the official TRB website and raise objections using the online objection tracker from July 15 to July 22, 2026.

articles.title: MIT World Peace University to host NSRTC 2026 from July 17 to 19 in Pune
articles.summary: MIT World Peace University will host the third National Scientists Round Table Conference from July 17 to 19 in Pune, bringing together scientists, researchers and students from diverse fields. The conference aims to encourage young minds to pursue research, innovation and problem-solving through interactions with leading scientists.

articles.title: Punjab PSSSB Veterinary Inspector Admit Card 2026 out at sssb.punjab.gov.in; download hall ticket here for July 19 written exam
articles.summary: Punjab PSSSB Veterinary Inspector Admit Card 2026 has been released on July 15, 2026, for the written examination scheduled on July 19, 2026. The recruitment process is being conducted for 310 Veterinary Inspector posts under the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Punjab.
